mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NOTICES WHERE DELETED_AT IS NULL

SELECT NOTICE_ID AS noticeId , TITLE AS title , CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rn , NOTICE_ID , TITLE , CREATED_AT FROM ( SELECT NOTICE_ID , TITLE , CREATED_AT FROM NOTICES WHERE DELETED_AT IS NULL ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{offset} + #{limit} ) WHERE rn > #{offset}
